content.body:
* feat: make owner.language/mode/autonomy generate real behavioral instructions

Replace plain bullet-point owner preferences in generated CLAUDE.md with
rich, actionable instruction blocks. Also add profile sync with conflict
resolution to `leo update`.

- language: artifact language instructions (en/pt/es)
- mode: token economy (verbose/concise/caveman, inspired by caveman project)
- autonomy: escalation rules (autonomous/balanced/supervised)
- leo update: sync profiles from core, prompt on conflicts

Closes #27

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add 5 C-level strategic profiles + dynamic profile list in leo init

- New profiles: CEO, CPO, CTO, CMO, CFO with rich context_injection
  (principles, methodology, failure modes, output expectations, escalation)
- askProfile() now reads from DefaultProfiles() dynamically instead of
  hardcoded 2-item menu — all 7 profiles listed alphabetically
- Generalist remains the default selection

Closes #29

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: owner config behavioral effect + C-level profiles + dynamic onboarding (#28)
